title: Central Asmat New Testament
description: If you are interested this text please contact Indonesian Bible Society, email: info@alkitab.or.id

language.name: Central Asmat
language.area: Asmat Regency; Sawa-Erma, Agats, Atsy, and Pantai Kasuari subdistricts. South coast from Owap River northwest to Farec River southwest, inland toward the foothills and inland. Also Mappi Regency coast, Nambai and Edera subdistricts, south of Yaqay [jaq] language.
